title: Nature's Delight
description: A mod which integrates Nature's Spirit and Farmer's Delight Refabricated.
body:
## What is Nature's Delight?
Nature's Delight is a mod which expands upon the vanilla Minecraft Game by integrating two mods, Farmer's Delight Refabricated and [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) to enhance the user experience and seamlessly blend the two experiences together. To do so, Nature's Delight adds in food items for the various related items in Nature's Spirit such as olives and coconuts and also fits new standards set by Farmer's Delight such as Cabinets for all wood types. Needless to say, for any person who enjoys rustic semi-realistic cooking and enhanced scenery inspired by the real world, these 3 mods together can provide a wonderful experience to any modded world. 

## Foods Added:
- Fafaru: A Tahitian dish, Fafaru is a depiction of a fermented raw fish with coconut eaten in Tahiti.
- Turnip Tagine: A Moroccan dish, Turnip Tagine takes Nature's Spirit's turnip and puts it in a root vegetable dish commonly eaten in Morocco!
- Sweet and Savory Saute: A dish from Kerala, India, Avial, the Sweet and Savory Saute is a selection of vegetables sauteed in a coconut sauce served over rice.
- Manakish: A Lebanese dish: Manakish is a flatbread with cheese, minced meat, and various other spices eaten in the levant
- Alfredo Pasta: An Italian dish, Alfredo pasta is a pasta topped with an Alfredo sauce made up of cheese goodness with chicken and olives.
- Cocada: A Latin American sweet, Cocadas embody the coconut goodness with a sugary taste.
- Coconut Bread: Inspired by the Dutch-Indonesian Cake, Klappertaart, Coconut Bread is made with bread, coconuts, and eggs.

THIS MOD DOES NOT WORK WITH FORGE FARMER'S DELIGHT EVEN WITH SINYTRA CONNECTOR
